variants: Duncan Tully currently resides on Dawnchime Row, where he works for the Daybreak Novelty Group. Originally from Foxspire Hamlet, he is celebrated for his innovative contributions, particularly his authored work, the Quartz Halo Circuit. His remarkable talents and creative ideas have culminated in receiving the esteemed Lucid Chronicle Prize, marking a high point in his career. Tully's journey reflects a steadfast commitment to advancing technology and storytelling, setting him apart in his profession.
